title: ortholoma pubescens
intro: Ortholoma pubescens, also known as the Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the genus Baileya and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Desert Marigold include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
